headline: Quaker Chemical (KWR) Earnings Expected to Grow: Should You Buy?
summary: Quaker Chemical (KWR) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

headline: How the Iran war is hitting U.S. homebuilders
summary: A slew of building suppliers reported price hikes in April on everything from foam insulation and roofing to windows and doors.
